name: Smothered Cajun Hash Browns
recipeIngredient: Large potatoes peeled and cut into 1 cm cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large heavy saucepan over medium heat until it begins to smoke.
2. Cook potato cubes in small batches, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crispy.
3. Remove the potatoes from the oil using tongs or a slotted spoon and drain on absorbent paper.
4. Discard the oil from the pan.
5. Add onions, capsicum, Tabasco, Cayenne pepper, ground black peppers, 2 cups water, and salt to the pan. Stir well to combine.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are tender.
7. If there is liquid remaining in the pan, uncover it, increase the heat to medium, and cook until the liquid evaporates while constantly stirring to prevent breaking the potatoes.
8. Stir in chopped green onions and parsley, cover, and remove from heat. Allow the mixture to stand for 5 minutes before serving with eggs and meat at any time of day.
